description: Are you looking for some summer garments for a special little boy? We have perfect Tshirts for you! These lovely Tops are available in blue and orange colour in sizes 3-24 months. They are great for taking on holiday or wearing day to day to bring a little touch of summer magic to your daily life. All shirts have a crew neck, popper fastening and have been finished with twin needle stitching to minimise wear and tear.
